geographic_scope: Zone I target box in northeastern Tokyo
theater_description: USAAF incendiary saturation raid on the Zone I target box in eastern Tokyo, centered on the densely populated working-class wards of Asakusa, Honjo, and Fukagawa.
geometry_method_note: Civilian denominator uses the target-zone population of around 1.1 million rather than all Tokyo residents.
military_area_note: No credible same-night military death count inside the target box was assembled.
civilian_area_note: Population exposure follows the identified Zone I target box because the raid was explicitly bounded to that area.
split_reason: Kept as a one-night core episode and not blended with later Tokyo raids or wider Japan bombing totals.
quality_note: Exceptionally bounded episode with strong same-night civilian death sourcing and a bounded civilian denominator, but no publishable military denominator.
